title: Ironclad Mod Pack
description: The Modpack for the Ironclad Community
body:
This is the official modpack and modded server for the Ironclad gaming community. This modpack is a collection of mods put together with a engaged gameplay experience in mind. It has many classic mods including IC2, Twilight Forest, Forestry, ComputerCraft, and Project Red (Buildcraft). Newer mods have also been added to spice up the fun, including TangoTek's TekTopia which will fit in nicely with MineColonies and the Millenaire mod!

The goal of this mod is to collect resources in mass and use those resources to develop and build the city building mods villages. Use ComputerCraft Turtles and Buildcraft Quarries to mine stone for your villages, and use Forestry and Industrial Craft to find ways to automate your more complicated resources!

Also included are several AI mods like Golemist and Rats to gather your resources for you! Use NPC's to your advantage to help progress your cities!

Performance mods have also been added to sustain a better gameplay environment.

This modpack is for the Ironclad community, feel free to download for your own entertainment. This modpack has no restrictions that would keep others from enjoying. This modpack may omit some pretty important mods to some people, this is partly because of a particular vision I'm working towards with this pack while still maintaining performance; I wanted a nostalgic feel for those who enjoyed the old days of modded Minecraft.

If you have any suggestions or request for mods to be added to this pack please join the Ironclad discord and make a post. Our discord link: https://dsc.gg/ironclad
